name: Applesauce Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar together until smooth.
2. Add the beaten egg to the mixture and stir well.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the cake flour, raisins, nutmeats, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and cloves.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, stirring continuously.
5. Stir in the hot applesauce until fully incorporated.
6. Pour the batter into a greased baking dish.
7. Bake in an oven preheated to 350 degrees Fahrenheit for approximately 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow the cake to cool completely before serving. It will stay moist for several days.
